justification: The diff correctly migrates from Java 8 to Java 21 by updating dependencies (Spring 4.3 -> 6.1, JUnit 4 -> 5, Mockito 1.9 -> 5.23, javax.* -> jakarta.*), replacing deprecated APIs (BigDecimal.ROUND_* -> RoundingMode, HandlerInterceptorAdapter -> HandlerInterceptor, MockitoAnnotations.initMocks -> openMocks), and using modern Java features (String.formatted, @Serial, @release). The migration is comprehensive and coherent, though it introduces Spring Boot starters which might be beyond a strict migration scope, and some minor formatting changes (e.g., assertNotNull argument order) are present but acceptable.
